package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_database_access_transaction_per_row_bulk_write: Layer: Database access. Flag bulk writes that open and commit one transaction per row.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule528NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario528Negative(records []Rule528NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
